title: neoplatytaenia pimpinelloides
intro: Neoplatytaenia pimpinelloides, also known as Pimpinella pimpinelloides, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to ease digestive issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Neoplatytaenia pimpinelloides include its ability to relieve flatulence, nausea, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Neoplatytaenia pimpinelloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a supplement to treat various health conditions.
